queries.question: Provide a list of all latest news and also provide a list of news analysis articles on the Turkey-Syria Earthquakes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Breaking_News.headline as title
FROM Events JOIN Breaking_News ON Events.eventId = Breaking_News.eventId
UNION
SELECT News_Analysis.title
FROM Events JOIN News_Analysis ON Events.eventId = News_Analysis.eventId
WHERE Events.eventName = "Turkey–Syria Earthquakes"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?events a :Events .
    ?breaking_news a :Breaking_News .
    ?breaking_news p:hasEvents ?events .
    ?breaking_news p:headline ?headline .
    BIND(?headline AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?events a :Events .
    ?news_analysis a :News_Analysis .
    ?news_analysis p:hasEvents ?events .
    ?news_analysis p:title ?title .
    ?events p:eventName ?eventname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?eventname_f) = "Turkey–Syria Earthquakes")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What latest news are there on the Turkey-Syria Earthquakes and what news analysis articles are there on the same topic?
queries.sql:
SELECT Breaking_News.headline as title
FROM Events JOIN Breaking_News ON Events.eventId = Breaking_News.eventId
WHERE Events.eventName = "Turkey–Syria Earthquakes"
UNION
SELECT News_Analysis.title
FROM Events JOIN News_Analysis ON Events.eventId = News_Analysis.eventId
WHERE Events.eventName = "Turkey–Syria Earthquakes"

    ?news_analysis p:title ?title .

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide latest news and news analysis on the Turkey-Syria Earthquakes.
